---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
format: html
navbar: false
---

<div class="top-header">
  <a class="home-link" href="index.html">Home</a>
  <div class="menu-toggle" onclick="toggleMenu()">☰</div>
</div>

<div id="side-menu" class="side-menu">
  <a href="about.html">About</a>
  <a href="resume.html">Resume</a>
  <a href="content.html">Projects</a>
  <a href="map_gallery.html">Map Gallery</a>
</div>

<div class="hero">

<h1 class="hero-name">Pritty Arattu</h1>

<div class="name-lines">
<div></div>
<div></div>
</div>

<div class="hero-tagline">

<div class="tagline-row">
<div class="tagline-line"></div>
<div class="tagline-text">dog lover</div>
</div>

<div class="tagline-row">
<div class="tagline-line"></div>
<div class="tagline-text">liDAR enthusiast</div>
</div>

<div class="tagline-row">
<div class="tagline-line"></div>
<div class="tagline-text">map nerd (professionally)</div>
</div>

</div>

<div class="social-links">
  <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/pritty-arattu-51b334149/" target="_blank">in</a>
  <a href="https://github.com/PrittyArattu" target="_blank">gh</a>
</div>

</div>

<script>
function toggleMenu() {
  document.getElementById("side-menu").classList.toggle("open");
}
</script>
